title: Artisan Marketplace Delhi
testimonial: This isn't just a marketplace — it's a celebration of Indian craftsmanship. Foot traffic exceeded projections by 140%, and we've become a cultural landmark in Delhi.
description: 10,000 sq ft multi-brand artisan marketplace showcasing 45+ Indian craftspeople and design collectives. Features modular vendor stalls with heritage finishes, a central interactive workshop space, expert-curated gallery zones, and a 100-seat tasting area for specialty foods. Designed to evolve with rotating installations.
